en: Why didn't you finish your homework?
ja: なぜ宿題を終わらせなかったの？
vi: Tại sao em không làm xong bài tập?

en: What can you say to this?
ko: 뭐라고 할 수 있을까? I don't know.
ja: これに何と言えますか？

en: Well, you could say, I don't know, I don't know, or I don't know, I don't know, or I
ko: I don't know. 또는 I don't know. I don't know. 또는 I don't know.
ja: えーと、I don't know, I don't know, または I don't know, I don't know, または
zhTW: 嗯，你可以說，I don't know，I don't know，或者 I don't know，I don't know，或者
vi: À, bạn có thể nói, I don't know, I don't know, hoặc I don't know, I don't know, hoặc

en: don't know, I don't know, or uh-uh, uh-uh.
ko: I don't know. 또는 uh uh uh uh. 다 I
ja: I don't know, I don't know, または uh-uh, uh-uh。
zhTW: I don't know，I don't know，或者 uh-uh，uh-uh。
vi: I don't know, I don't know, hoặc uh-uh, uh-uh.

en: These all mean, I don't know.
ko: I don't know. 또는 I don't know. I don't know. 또는 I don't know.
ja: これらはすべて「分からない」という意味です。
zhTW: 這些都是「我不知道」的意思。
vi: Tất cả đều có nghĩa là, tôi không biết.
